channel.title: Ultimate Comics Ultimates on jverkamp.com
channel.description: Recent content in Ultimate Comics Ultimates on jverkamp.com

item.title: Ultimate Comics Ultimates: Disassembled
item.description:
Who would be the absolute worst person in the Ultimate Universe to get the Infinity Stones?

Worse than that.

Now… both at once.

It’s a pretty crazy volume with some interesting twists and some big action pieces.

But really, it’s just the beginning of the end. Cataclysm is coming.

Onward!

item.title: Ultimate Comics Ultimates by Sam Humphries, Vol. 1
item.description:
President Cap. Hydra. Fury doing Fury things.

It’s certainly a jam packed volume… but for all that happens, what has actually changed?

Feels like they’re trying to reboot a reboot while holding together entirely too much damage they (the writers) have done to this version of the universe.

Overall: it’s fine, but I’m not surprised that this line doesn’t last long. Being yet another Volume 1 doesn’t help. Onward!

Side note: Cap is a terrible President. 😃

item.title: Ultimate Comics: Divided We Fall, United We Stand
item.description: Things are … slightly more broken then I realized.

item.title: Ultimate Comics Ultimates by Jonathan Hickman, Vol. 2
item.description:
Well that escalated again’ly.

Given the number of sudden super powered threats, it’s not over surprising. But in a world reeling… I’m doubtful we’ll get the gravitas this deserves.

A lot certainly happens, but I find it hard to be invested in any of it. Onward!

item.title: Ultimate Comics Hawkeye
item.description:
So Hawkeye.

He’s been around this whole time… and only sort of in the spotlight. Which I suppose us par for the course for him.

It’s interesting getting a bit more about what else was going on right when Reed came back.

Even if it’s weird to have both happening at once.

It’s a fine story. Just… fine.

item.title: Ultimate Comics Ultimates by Jonathan Hickman, Vol. 1
item.description:
And so we’re back with the Ultimates…

… and things are going very. very sideways.

Because there’s a new* villain in town.

This should be interesting.
